title: Monday API calls not updating board columns
excerpt: Has anyone seen an issue where API requests are sent and a success response is sent with the proper response but the board columns are not actually updated. The issue also only occurs when running on our production serve…

posts.author: cartersingle (Carter Singletary)
posts.cookedHtml: Has anyone seen an issue where API requests are sent and a success response is sent with the proper response but the board columns are not actually updated. The issue also only occurs when running on our production server. In development and using the monday API playground the updates are successful. Any ideas or things to try would be great.
